pages.title: PhaserForge Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to PhaserForge written in Phaser 4: what it is, its core philosophy (behavior-as-content), the major subsystems, and how they fit together. Links to all child sections for deeper exploration.

pages.title: Getting Started & Project Setup
pages.purpose: How to clone, install dependencies, configure environment variables, run the dev server, and understand the npm scripts (dev, build, test). Covers Vite config, tsconfig, and the postinstall Prisma generate hook. Also covers the public/ config YAMLs (editor-config.yaml, editor-registry.yaml), the res/ asset directory, the guardrails/ AI agent workflow rules, and the scripts/ utility scripts.

pages.title: Architecture Overview
pages.purpose: Describes the four-layer architecture: React Editor UI, Phaser Canvas Runtime, YAML Data Model, and Express/Prisma Backend. Explains the EventBus bridge pattern and unidirectional data flow. Links to detailed child sections.

pages.title: Data Model
pages.purpose: Overview of the YAML-backed project data model: ProjectSpec, GameSceneSpec, EntitySpec, GroupSpec, AttachmentSpec, and related types. Links to child pages for serialization and validation details.

pages.title: Core Types & Schema
pages.purpose: Deep dive into types.ts: ProjectSpec, GameSceneSpec, EntitySpec, GroupSpec, AttachmentSpec, TargetRef, AssetFileSource, InputActionMapSpec, CollisionRuleSpec, SpriteSheetAssetSpec, CounterSpec, CollectionSpec, PatternSpec, and all discriminated unions. Covers the legacy Behaviors/Actions model vs. the modern Attachments model. Also covers the Snippets/Macros legacy migration path to Patterns.

pages.title: Serialization, Migration & Validation
pages.purpose: Covers parseProjectYaml, serializeProjectToYaml, migrateSceneSpec, migrateLegacySnippetsAndMacrosToPatterns, and validateSceneSpec. Explains the Parse-Migrate-Validate pipeline, YAML round-trip, and backward-compatibility guarantees.

pages.title: Editor UI
pages.purpose: Overview of the React-based editor shell: AppShell layout, pane structure, theming, and global keyboard shortcuts. Links to child pages covering each major UI subsystem.

pages.title: EditorStore: State Management
pages.purpose: Explains the Redux-style EditorStore reducer, EditorProvider, EditorState shape, HistoryState (undo/redo), persistence to localStorage, and the full list of EditorAction types. Covers pending history, merge keys, and canvas interaction lifecycle.

pages.title: Entity List & Scene Graph
pages.purpose: Covers EntityList, EntityListView, sidebar scope tabs (Scene vs Project), drag-and-drop reordering, multi-select, renaming, and the AssetsDock integration. Explains how the scene graph tree is rendered and navigated. Also covers the Project Revisions pane: delta-based history, checkpoint/delta model, coalescing autosaves, and human-readable revision summaries.

pages.title: Inspector & Property Editing
pages.purpose: Covers the Inspector component, sub-inspectors (entity, group/formation, attachment, trigger zone), ValidatedNumberInput blur-to-commit pattern, BoundsHelperPanel, multi-entity inspector, and the InspectorFoldout pattern. Also covers SceneStatePanel for managing project-level Counters and Collections.

pages.title: Events Panel & Behavior Authoring
pages.purpose: Covers EventsPanel, AttachmentSpec authoring, EventBlockSpec lifecycle, loop templates (intro_then_repeat, repeat_with_cooldown), parallel groups, nested repeats, ActionLibraryDrawer, action pins, and the Patterns system. Covers patternCommands, snippetCommands, macroCommands and the migration from Snippets/Macros to Patterns.

pages.title: Formations & Group Management
pages.purpose: Covers GroupSpec, formation layouts (grid, line, circle, arc, v_formation, diamond), CreateFormationPanel, CreateFormationDraftPanel, groupCommands, formationLayout, dissolve/ungroup, and the layout popover UI.

pages.title: YAML File Controls & Persistence
pages.purpose: Covers ViewbarYamlControls, the File System Access API integration (open/save/save-as), yamlPickerState, yamlFileHandles, yamlFileExport, dirty flag, source label, and the startIn handle for directory memory.

pages.title: Phaser Canvas Engine
pages.purpose: Overview of the Phaser-side architecture: BootScene, EditorScene, GameScene, PhaserHost, EventBus, and the runtime initialization. Links to child pages for each scene and the canvas interaction system.

pages.title: Scene Lifecycle: BootScene, EditorScene & GameScene
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the three Phaser scenes: BootScene as state machine controller, EditorScene for authoring (marquee selection, formation drafts, hitbox overlays, reference ghosts, camera pan/zoom), and GameScene for runtime execution (physics, spawning, audio).

pages.title: Canvas Interaction & Geometry
pages.purpose: Covers canvasInteraction.ts (DragState, HoverState, computeDragFrameResult, grid snapping, drag threshold), canvasGeometry.ts (hitTestCanvas priority algorithm, getBoundsHandles, calculateBoundsAfterHandleDrag), CanvasOverlay, and popupPositioning.

pages.title: EventBus & React-Phaser Bridge
pages.purpose: Explains the EventBus singleton, all event names (runtime:load-project, canvas-select, canvas-move-entity, scene-fit-view, etc.), the AppShell synchronization lifecycle, and the formation draft pipeline.

pages.title: Compiler & Runtime Engine
pages.purpose: Overview of the compilation pipeline (spec → CompiledScene) and the runtime execution engine. Links to child pages for the compiler, action system, and runtime services.

pages.title: Compilation Pipeline
pages.purpose: Covers compileScene, compileBehaviors, compileAttachments, opRegistry, the migration/validation pre-pass, entity resolution, parallel group tagging (pargrp: prefix), and the ActionManager lifecycle.

pages.title: Action System
pages.purpose: Covers the Action base class, ActionManager, and all built-in action types: MoveUntil, MoveXUntil, MoveYUntil, MoveBy, MoveTo, Wait, Repeat, Sequence, Parallel, Call, EmitEvent, InputDrive, InputFire, BlinkUntil, HoldUntil, OrbitPattern, ParametricMotionUntil, TweenUntil, CycleFramesUntil, counter/collection actions (AddToCounter, SetCounter, ClampCounter, AddSelfToCollection, RemoveSelfFromCollection).

pages.title: Conditions & Triggers
pages.purpose: Covers all Condition types (BoundsHit, ElapsedTime, CounterCompare, InputActionEdge, Instant, Never), TriggerZone system, triggerScripts, collisionScripts, and the updateTriggers heartbeat loop.

pages.title: Runtime Services
pages.purpose: Covers the RuntimeServices interface and its four implementations: BasicAudioService (music/SFX), BasicCollisionService (overlap detection), BasicInputService (keyboard/mouse/gamepad mapping), and BasicVarsService (counters, collections, variables).

pages.title: Layered Runtime: Base Scene & Waves
pages.purpose: Explains the Laser Gates model: baseSceneId, persistent base layer, swappable wave scenes, scene.gotoWave(), namespace separation, ghost rendering in edit mode, and the AppShell synchronization for wave transitions.

pages.title: Backend & Cloud Services
pages.purpose: Overview of the Express backend, Prisma ORM, authentication system, and cloud game storage. Links to child pages for the server architecture and database schema.

pages.title: Express Server & Authentication
pages.purpose: Covers server/src/index.ts entrypoint, Express 5 app setup, authRouter endpoints (CSRF, signup, login, logout, /me, GitHub OAuth), rate limiting, session token hashing, cookie management, requireAuth middleware, and the repository pattern.

pages.title: Database Schema & Prisma ORM
pages.purpose: Covers the Prisma schema (User, OAuthAccount, Session, Game, CloudAsset, Invite models), migration workflow, prisma.config.ts, Railway deployment, DATABASE_URL configuration, and the planned Games CRUD API.

pages.title: Cloud Account Panel & Client API
pages.purpose: Covers src/cloud/api.ts (fetchCsrfToken, signup, login, logout, me, listGames, createGame, getGame, updateGame), the CloudAccountPanel React component, WorkspaceConflictModal, cloud autosave lifecycle, GitHub OAuth flow, and the planned game-only web player export bundle.

pages.title: Testing Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Overview of the three-tier testing strategy: unit tests (Vitest), component tests, and E2E tests (Playwright). Links to child pages for the test bridge and E2E patterns.

pages.title: PhaserForgeTestBridge & E2E Helpers
pages.purpose: Covers the window.__PHASER_FORGE_TEST__ bridge (getState, getSceneSnapshot, setMode, dispatch, undo/redo, tapWorld, dragWorld, dragBoundsHandle, worldToClient, setPointerWorld, pointerDownEntity), the boot mutex, seedProject/seedSampleScene, and synthetic drag-and-drop for WebKit.

pages.title: CI/CD Pipeline & Playwright Configuration
pages.purpose: Covers the GitHub Actions CI workflow (build-test job, sharded E2E matrix, smoke/critical tag filtering, nightly full-suite), the Railway backend deployment workflow (change detection, security checks), Playwright project configuration, and the Dependabot setup.
